response.justification: Bogdan brings 17 years of broad software engineering experience with a current Staff-level title and directly relevant work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq. His TypeScript depth and cloud (AWS CDK) exposure are genuine assets. However, the role demands 8+ years of production AI work, and his GenAI engagement is limited to his current position (April 2025-present). Python—the dominant language for AI engineering—does not appear in his skills. RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, and multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI) are conspicuously absent from the resume, leaving the core technical requirements largely unverified.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) development and agentic workflow infrastructure at current role directly maps to a listed key technology
17+ years of polyglot engineering across distributed systems, data integration, and cloud (AWS CDK) shows strong technical breadth for a customer-facing staff role
Demonstrated staff-level scope: technical mentorship (Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course), open-source platform ownership, and conference talks
concerns: Python is absent from the skills list, yet it is the primary language called out in both required and preferred qualifications for AI/ML work
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks—all core to the role's day-to-day responsibilities
Fewer than 2 months of explicit GenAI experience on record; the 8-year production AI requirement is not met, and the resume provides no detail on scope or impact of AI work beyond the job title
